title: Founding Product Designer
summary: Shape the end-to-end VivahGo experience across marketing, couple workflows, and internal tools.
highlights: Own UX and visual direction across web and mobile surfaces
Turn messy planning workflows into calm, practical interfaces
Work closely with founders on product strategy and launches

title: Full Stack Engineer
summary: Build product features across the React frontend, APIs, admin tooling, and infrastructure integrations.
highlights: Ship fast across React, Node, MongoDB, and integrations
Improve reliability, performance, and developer ergonomics
Work directly on customer-facing workflows with visible impact

title: Vendor Growth & Operations
summary: Help onboard, support, and grow the vendor side of the VivahGo marketplace.
highlights: Coordinate onboarding for venue, decor, and planning partners
Improve vendor profile quality and marketplace readiness
Translate field feedback into product and operations improvements
